texto: The act of writing, it seems to me, makes up a shelter, allows space to what would otherwise be hidden, crossed out, mutilated. Sometimes writing can work toward a reparation, making a sheltering space for the mind. Yet it feeds off ruptures, tears in what might otherwise seem a seamless, oppressive fabric.
explicacao: Citação de Meena Alexander sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The act of writing, it seems to me, makes up a shelter, allows space to what would otherwise be h…” articula reflexao, decolonization, writing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e writing.
